value.body:
## Context

The database projection can skip invalid source objects and expose warnings. Users need to see and resolve those warnings without reading logs.

## Outcome

Repository warning screens show invalid objects, skipped records, source paths, impact, and available repair actions.

## Acceptance criteria

- Warnings list includes repository, object path, severity, message, and first/last seen timestamps where available.
- Detail view explains whether the warning affects tickets, records, history, search, or sync.
- Safe repair actions are exposed when supported; otherwise guidance is explicit.
- Repair/resync results refresh status and warning counts.
- Tests cover warning DTO mapping and repair/resync outcomes.

frontmatter.title: Add projection warning inspector and repair flow

value.title: Add projection warning inspector and repair flow
